74338.subject: The Highest-Paid Players At The 2026 World Cup
74338.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/highest-paid-players-2026-world-cup-forbes-magazine-m5eqc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BJPEJoBwoTGGNZqeLpVn8nQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2RgX6yb6jwZIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq8lsr6i~30-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq8lsr6i-30
  
Good evening, This year’s FIFA World Cup will be the first to feature billionaire players—41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo captaining Portugal and 38-year-old Lionel Messi leading Argentina in its title defense. However, they aren’t the only players raking it in. Here are the 11 highest-paid players competing this year. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Miguel J. Rodriguez Carrillo/AFP via Getty Images Why Selling Your SpaceX Shares Too Quickly Could Cost You Flipping IPO shares isn’t against the law. But at some brokerages, you might get penalized. The Dallas Morning News via Getty Images Karmelo Anthony Conviction—How A Teenage Stabbing Case Became A Racial Flashpoint In Texas The case captured the attention of well-known figures, including rapper Cardi B, who said the sentence was "disgusting."
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/highest-paid-players-2026-world-cup-forbes-magazine-m5eqc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BJPEJoBwoTGGNZqeLpVn8nQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2RgX6yb6jwZIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mq8lsr6i~30-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq8lsr6i-30
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BJPEJoBwoTGGNZqeLpVn8nQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2RgX6yb6jwZIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mq8lsr6i~30-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq8lsr6i-30
Ви отримуєте сповіщення е-поштою від LinkedIn. Інші бачитимуть, що ви є підписником.


Скасувати підписку https://www.linkedin.com/series-notifications/?action=unsubscribe&memberToken=ADoAADmXJ98BlqNfDlPIQsT8i8GBT4eiyg7PkZ

74337.subject: Mastercard Opens Its Rails to AI Agents
74337.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Mastercard](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)**[ opens its card rails to AI agents, 31 partners](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)**[ ships XRPL AI kit as Mastercard names it partner](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)

* **[DOJ](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)**[ subpoenas JPMorgan, BofA, Wells Fargo over debanking](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)

* **[Japan's megabanks](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)**[ form yen stablecoin council, live by 2027](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)

* **[Binance](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)**[ puts brokerage stocks on-chain with bStocks launch](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)

AI-meets-crypto stories today. **Mastercard** opened its card network to autonomous AI agents on Wednesday, launching **[Agent Pay for Machines](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)** with **31 partners**; Coinbase, RippleX, Solana Foundation, Polygon, Aave Labs, and Stellar among them, and stablecoin settlement built in from day one. Within the same news cycle, **Ripple** shipped the [XRPL AI Starter Kit](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines), wiring XRP and RLUSD payments into the agent toolchains devs already use.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9d5fb1f6-e233-4313-8e53-76981459f988/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## DeFi's Near-Death Moment | Mike Silagadze on Ether.fi, Security, and What Comes Next

How close did DeFi come to a systemic collapse? **Camila Russo** sits down with **Mike Silagadze**, co-founder and CEO of Ether.fi, for the full post-mortem on the Kelp exploit and the DeFi United rescue — why the default path could

74335.subject: The Daily Degen - June 10th, 2026
74335.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
74335.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-10th-2026

Happy Wednesday friends! Tons of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.207T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $695.30
Gold: $4,081.90
Silver: $63.63
Oil (WTI): $90.55
US 10Y Treasury: 4.544%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 15
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Big announcement from the legends at @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - $HYPE is now accepted as collateral!
As stated in the official announcement below:
“$HYPE is accepted collateral at Maple. 
Institutions holding it can borrow against their position on tailored, overcollateralized terms, structured and managed by the Maple credit team. 
No selling required.”
There are tons of other cool things going on as well, and if you want to learn all about them, check out the recent interview that Maple co-founder @syrupsid [ https://substack.com/redirect/0c96df1f-f424-4baa-8e35-f59ebd72802c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] did with @Genfinity below!
And- as always- make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates too, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly red today. Best-performing top 25 chain on the weekly is Ink (#13) at +27.01%. 
Protocols are mixed today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the weekly is Sentora (#25) at +23.60%. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Revenue Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @tradeonpear. Twitter bio states “Trade your instincts.” Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @rektonomist_:
-New project called @olivetreeyield. Twitter bio states “Stablecoin-powered annuities”. Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @lmrankhan:
Top Stablecoin Yields
(note: these are the top Stablecoin Yields, sourced from @DefiLlama (all types, $10M+ TVL o
